closed_form_equation_v100.feature_term: K_f_v100 = K_f_v99 + K_f_v99 * S_sys_field_mesh_score * 0.004 + K_f_v99 * B_plastic_v44 * 0.001 + K_f_v99 * D_feature_v38 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v100.structure_term: K_s_v100 = K_s_v99 + K_s_v99 * S_sys_field_mesh * 0.007 + K_s_v99 * B_struct_v44 * 0.004 + K_s_v99 * D_structure_v38 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v100.learning_term: K_l_v100 = K_l_v99 + K_l_v99 * R_train_v44 + M_sys_field_mesh * 1000 + S_sys_field_mesh_score * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v38 * 1000

project_readout.summary: v100 checks whether systemic low-risk field lattice starts turning into a mesh-like low-risk field instead of only lattice-organizing the previous field.
project_readout.next_question: next push this mesh-like low-risk field into larger and longer systems to test whether it keeps organizing toward a lower-risk steady topology.
